params.name: Annals of Joseon
params.description:
On Mar 6, 1934 AD, Records of Joseon were eventually finished.
Records of Joseon are a series of great historic works covering the 27 kings' reign during 500 years. The Records' compilation started during the reign of King Taejo and had never been interrupted, making them a massive chronicle in the world.
